title: Everything You Need to Know About Automated Ebook Delivery After Crypto Payment
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator from Nigeria, stuck with an ebook that nobody can buy because your platform of choice doesn't support your country. You can't use PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip because their strict rules and country restrictions block your path to success. But what if there was a way to sell ebooks online without these limitations? You're in the right place, because we're about to break down a game-changing solution that uses crypto payments for instant, automated ebook delivery.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is a system that lets you sell digital products, like ebooks, online without the need for traditional payment processors. This is especially important for creators from countries with restricted access to popular platforms like PayPal or Stripe. With this technology, you can receive payments directly in cryptocurrency, which are then used to trigger automated ebook delivery, eliminating middlemen and their fees.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine ($49.99) is the brains behind this operation. It's a full backend solution that uses a bot engine to verify payments, generate PDF receipts, and automate ebook delivery. This means you don't need a payment processor account, and your ebooks can be delivered instantly to customers who make a purchase. The engine integrates with the NOWPayments payment processor, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, ensuring that your customers can pay with their preferred coin.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is designed for digital creators, like writers, artists, and educators, who want to sell ebooks, courses, or other digital products without the hassle of traditional payment processors. It's also perfect for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores. By using the Core Shop Engine, you can increase your sales and reach a wider audience, without being limited by country restrictions or platform rules.
Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is the key to success for digital creators from restricted countries.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine consists of several key components, including the admin dashboard, which provides transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration allows customers to pay with their preferred cryptocurrency, using multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. The Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, admin dashboard, and Web3 Wallet Connect, provides everything you need to get started, including priority updates and Discord support.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know the ins and outs of automated ebook delivery after crypto payment, it's time to take action. Start by setting up your Core Shop Engine, integrating it with NOWPayments, and configuring your ebook delivery settings. Next, create your digital products, like ebooks or courses, and upload them to your store. Finally, promote your store and start selling your digital products to customers worldwide, without the limitations of traditional payment processors.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The most important question on your mind is probably: 'How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?' The answer is simple: use the Core Shop Engine, which provides a full backend solution for automated ebook delivery after crypto payment. This means you can receive payments directly in cryptocurrency, eliminating the need for PayPal or other traditional payment processors.
The Core Shop Engine provides a full backend solution for automated ebook delivery, eliminating the need for traditional payment processors.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a way to sell digital downloads without fees, or sell templates and fonts without using Gumroad or Payhip, you're in the right place. The Core Shop Engine is a game-changing solution that lets you sell digital products online without the need for traditional payment processors. Check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling ebooks online using the Core Shop Engine, follow these steps: Set up your Core Shop Engine and integrate it with NOWPayments. Configure your ebook delivery settings and create your digital products. Upload your ebooks or courses to your store and promote your store to customers worldwide. Finally, receive payments directly in cryptocurrency and trigger automated ebook delivery.
Selling ebooks online without PayPal or Stripe is now possible with the Core Shop Engine and NOWPayments integration.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
